title: Ghost Factory
overview: The story of what happens when a small "reality" television show shoots its last episode at the long abandoned Petrie Munitions Factory, and encounters the long dead evil owner Malcom. The show Terror TV is shooting the first show of its second season with the premise that the show places contestants in "haunted" locations and they get paid if they stay and "survive" one night. When the contestants and crew begin to speak of ghostly sightings and visions, mayhem ensures. The cast and crew of the show have their reality challenged by the captured souls of the children who have long suffered under Petrie's spell.
